description: Mechanical/HVAC Inspector — inspects heating, ventilation, and air conditioning installations for IMC compliance, refrigerant handling, ductwork, and combustion air

hard_stops.label: Combustion Air Insufficient
hard_stops.logic: Combustion air supply for fuel-burning appliances does not meet code minimum — carbon monoxide hazard per IMC Chapter 7

hard_stops.label: Flue/Vent Connector Improperly Installed
hard_stops.logic: Flue pipe or vent connector is improperly sized, sloped, or connected — combustion gas leakage hazard

hard_stops.label: Refrigerant Leak Detected
hard_stops.logic: Refrigerant leak detected in HVAC system — environmental and health hazard per EPA Section 608 regulations

soft_flags.label: Energy Code Compliance Check
soft_flags.logic: HVAC system efficiency rating should be verified against current energy code requirements (IECC/ASHRAE 90.1)
